alert: Users report API timeouts, but web requests eventually complete.
root_cause: load balancer idle timeout lower than web response time

evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:web_server: Web logs show successful responses after longer processing times.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:load_balancer: Load balancer logs show edge resets before web responses finish.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_config:load_balancer:IDLE_TIMEOU: IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS is lower than the web response duration.

logs: WARN backend response arrived after client connection closed

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(load balancer idle timeout lower than web response time, increase load balancer idle timeout)
distractors: Web responses eventually succeed; the edge timeout fires before completion.
